Text: Milena is my professional opposite, and that's exactly why working with her made me better. I move fast, sketch loose, iterate loud. She slows down, reads the brief twice, catches the thing everyone else missed. Where I'd push forward, she'd ask the right question. She's one of those designers who makes the whole team sharper without making noise about it. Thorough and analytical without losing the human in the problem. She took every project seriously in the way that made you trust her work before you'd even seen it.  I'd hire her again without hesitation

Madeleine quickly became a valued member of the team at EdAider. Her strengths are her positive attitude, curiosity, and ability to communicate with both empathy and clarity. She was always willing to take on new challenges — including ones outside her core role, like engaging with visitors at our booth at the SET trade fair. Madeleine consistently gives her best, is receptive to feedback, and has a genuine drive to learn and grow. As a designer, she is thorough, proactive, empathetic, and solution-oriented. She works well both independently and as part of a team. I've truly enjoyed working with Madeleine and am grateful for the thoughtful questions she asked that made me stop and think.

Madeleine har snabbt blivit en uppskattad medarbetare på EdAider. Madeleines starka sidor hennes positiva attityd, nyfikenhet och förmåga att kommunicera både empatiskt och pedagogiskt. Hon provade gärna nya uppgifter, även de som låg utanför hennes arbetsområde, till exempel att prata med besökare i vårt bås på SET-mässan. Madeleine gör alltid sitt bästa, är lyhörd för feedback och vill lära sig och utvecklas så mycket som möjligt. Som designer är hon noggrann, initiativrik, empatisk och lösningsorienterad. Hon jobbar bra både individuellt och i team. Jag har verkligen uppskattat att jobba med Madeleine och är tacksam för alla kloka frågor som fått mig att tänka till.

I was gladly surprised when Alexander reached out to me and wanted to as a candidate for a job. We had an interesting conversation discussing the pros and cons of the job.   I felt heard and understood, my needs and goals were much more important than filling the role. I felt that Alexander wanted my best throughout the whole process, gave his advice and support, advocated on my behalf with the client.  It all ended well. I got my dream job and the client was also very satisfied. Win win, thanks to Alexander.
